name: Ashes of Our Youth || Alpha Pack
description:
And I can't make it on my own

because my heart is in Ohio!

They're all your fated mates?!


Ashes of Our Youth are releasing a new album!

And you're the luckiest omega in town because you snagged a coveted spot on the guest list to the album release party at the legendary Hollywood Tour Hotel.

Every who's anyone in the music scene is here tonight.

You think you might just get lucky asking Hayley Williams for a selfie but, baby, your nights about to get a whole lot weirder.

Because surprise!

It turns out you have a fated mate-

Six of them actually

And they just so happen to be here at this party.

Because your Fated Mates?

Is Ashes of Our Youth.

Hope you're really good at multi-tasking!



So, 30k

Holy Shit. I remember hitting 10k in late January of last year and finding that surreal, and then just before the new year, I hit 30k. (Yes this milestone is late, I'm playing catch up after the advent calendar.

So hitting 30k is very wild and I feel honored. I'm someone who has always loved writing and creating but never thought I would be able to share that with people on this kind of scale. It's scary at times, but thrilling too.

Especially these idiots boys who are my love letter to one of the most fun periods of my life. I wouldn't trade those years for anything in the world-- even if the sunburns were brutal.

Thank you to Owleen for this idea, who kept making a joke of turning ashes into her own alpha harem. (#Owlkeyforever)

And Sooa for making this gen of all the boys together. Ive have tried tor MONTHS with Midjourney to make a gen of the full band but its never worked. LLMs just really struggle with groups. But Sooa let me lovingly bully her into the image you see above.

To my other Ashes girlies in my server, I adore you all very much. ♥

I'm finally using Hawthorne Height's Ohio is For Lovers for a bot. This song was literally my very first ringtone back in high school and the entire reason Ashes is based in Ohio because it came on while I was creating Kellin and I just had to.

P.S. I know the Hollywood Tour Hotel is now an apartment building but hey, the omegaverse doesn't exist either so~

Also! Since this is a celebration, You can enjoy the following links to see each of the Ashes boy wrapped up as a present.

☆ Kellin ☆ Mikey ☆ Vic ☆ Davey ☆
creator: m00nprincess
